title:
Module 1
The Basics
subtitle: Course Overview and the Complete Basics to Starting AI Models

blocks.content: The AI Influencer Method is a system for building and monetizing social media pages using AI-generated personas. These personas look, act, and engage like real influencers but are entirely created and managed through artificial intelligence tools. This is not about catfishing or deception. This is a business model. You are building a brand, not pretending to be a real person.

The technology behind this method has reached a point where AI-generated images and videos are indistinguishable from real content when done correctly. The tools are accessible, the demand is proven, and the window for early movers is wide open. But this is a real business that requires real work, real patience, and real strategy. The people who fail are the ones who skip steps or expect overnight results.

items: How to create an AI influencer from scratch using professional tools
Which platforms to use and exactly how to grow on each one
The content pipeline that produces consistent, believable content
How to warm up accounts so they look human to algorithms
How to scale to multiple personas once your first page works
How to protect your accounts from bans and shadowbans
How to turn free followers into paying subscribers
No physical limitations on content output — generate 24/7
Consistent brand and persona across all content — the face never changes
Scalable to multiple personas simultaneously — one operator, many pages
Lower operating cost than managing real influencers
Full creative control over every aspect of the persona
You own the model — no creator dependency or contract issues
Content pipeline can be systematized and batched efficiently

right.content: Attention flows through a funnel. Free content creates interest. Interest creates followers. Followers convert to paying subscribers. Every platform in this system serves a specific role in moving people through that funnel.

items: Instagram / TikTok — Free content drives discovery and builds trust
Threads — Engagement engine that feeds Instagram growth
Link in Bio — Bridge between free attention and paid conversion
Telegram — Pre-sell warming layer for hesitant followers
Subscription Platform — Monetization endpoint where revenue is captured

right.title: IMAGE PLACEHOLDER
right.content: Visual funnel diagram showing traffic flow: Social Media (top) → Link in Bio → Telegram → Subscription Platform (bottom). Show the funnel narrowing at each stage with dollar signs increasing.

right.title: Critical Rule
right.content: Revenue comes from the funnel, not from posting. The system works as a whole — no single platform generates money on its own. Every piece of content exists to move someone one step closer to paying.

blocks.content: This section exists because most courses skip it and most students quit because of unrealistic expectations. The AI influencer method works, but it does not work overnight. Understanding the real timeline prevents frustration and keeps you focused on what matters.

items: Month 1: $0-$200 — You are building the foundation. Model creation, account setup, warmup. Most of this month is preparation with little to no revenue
Month 2-3: $100-$500 — Accounts are live, content is flowing, first followers converting. Revenue trickles in slowly as the funnel starts working
Month 3-6: $500-$3,000 — Consistent posting, growing audience, funnel optimized. Revenue grows as follower count and trust increase
Month 6+: $2,000-$10,000+ — Scaled operations with multiple accounts or personas. Revenue compounds as systems become efficient

left.title: IMAGE PLACEHOLDER
left.content: Bar chart showing realistic monthly revenue ranges: Month 1 ($0-200), Month 2-3 ($100-500), Month 3-6 ($500-3K), Month 6+ ($2K-10K+). Use green gradient bars with dollar ranges labeled.

left.title: Reality Check
left.content: Most people earn under $500 in their first three months. This is normal. The operators making $10K+ per month have been grinding for 6-12 months and have systematized everything. Do not compare your Month 1 to someone else's Month 12.

right.content: This is not passive income. During the first 3 months, expect to invest 2-4 hours per day minimum. This includes content generation, posting, engagement, account management, and funnel optimization.

items: Content generation: 30-60 minutes per day (batched sessions)
Posting and engagement: 30-60 minutes per day across platforms
Account management: 15-30 minutes per day (safety checks, metrics)
Strategy and planning: 15-30 minutes per day
Total: 2-4 hours daily, 7 days per week during early growth

right.content: After Month 3-6, once systems are built and content is batched, daily time investment drops to 1-2 hours for maintenance and growth. The early investment of time is what creates the system that eventually runs efficiently.

right.title: What Separates Winners from Quitters
right.content: The people who succeed treat this as a business from Day 1. They follow the system, they do not skip steps, and they do not quit during the slow early months. The ones who fail expect instant results, skip the warmup, or abandon ship after 2 weeks of low revenue.

blocks.content: One of the advantages of the AI influencer model is the low barrier to entry. You do not need tens of thousands in capital to start. However, there are real costs you need to budget for. Going in underfunded leads to cutting corners, which leads to bans and wasted effort.

items: Dedicated phone or device: $150-$400 (used phones work fine)
Prepaid SIM card: $10-$30
VPN service: $5-$12 per month
AI image generation tools (Seedream 4.5, Nano Banana 2): $0-$50 per month
Kling video credits: $10-$30 per month
Link in bio service (AllMyLinks/Linktree): Free
Photo editing tool (Photopea): Free
Total minimum to start: approximately $200-$500

left.title: Budget Tip
left.content: Start with the minimum. Do not invest in premium tools until your first page is generating revenue. Free tiers and budget options work perfectly for your first persona.

right.content: These are the tools you will use daily. Each one serves a specific function in the content pipeline. Modules 2-4 cover each tool in detail.

items: Seedream 4.5 + Nano Banana 2 — AI image generation (photorealistic output)
Kling — AI video generation (turns images into realistic video clips)
Photopea or Photoshop — Image editing and artifact removal
CapCut or DaVinci Resolve — Video editing (free)
VPN — Geo-targeting and account safety
AllMyLinks or Linktree — Link in bio funnel page
Telegram — Pre-sell warming channel
Content calendar — Planning and scheduling (Google Sheets works)

right.title: IMAGE PLACEHOLDER
right.content: Tool stack grid showing each tool with its purpose: Image Gen (Seedream 4.5 / Nano Banana 2), Video Gen (Kling), Editing (Photopea), Video Edit (CapCut), VPN, Link Page, Telegram, Calendar. Use clean icons or logos for each.

items: Instagram — Main traffic and brand hub. This is your most important platform
Threads — Engagement and discovery engine that feeds Instagram growth
Telegram — Pre-sell funnel that warms followers before they subscribe
TikTok — Secondary reach and discovery (supplements Instagram)
Reddit — Niche viral exposure inside specific communities
Twitter/X — Brand presence and discovery through conversations

right.content: What You Do NOT Need to Start
People waste money and time on things that do not matter in the first 3 months. Focus on the essentials and add complexity later.

items: You do NOT need a $3,000 PC — cloud-based tools work for beginners
You do NOT need multiple phones — start with one persona, one device
You do NOT need paid courses on prompting — this course covers everything
You do NOT need a team — solo operators can run one page profitably
You do NOT need advanced video editing skills — simple clips outperform complex ones

right.title: Mindset
right.content: This is a real business. The people who fail are the ones who skip steps, rush the process, or expect results without work. The window for early movers is open now. But the window rewards builders, not browsers.

summary_points: The AI Influencer Method is a real business that requires 2-4 hours daily and real patience
Revenue comes from the funnel, not just from posting — every platform serves a role in moving followers to paying subscribers
Realistic expectations: $0-200 in Month 1, $500-3K by Month 3-6, $2K-10K+ at Month 6+ with scaled operations
Minimum startup cost is approximately $200-$500 — start lean and reinvest revenue
Core tool stack: Seedream 4.5 + Nano Banana 2 for images, Kling for video, Photopea for editing, CapCut for video editing
Instagram and Threads are mandatory primary platforms — TikTok, Reddit, and Twitter/X support the system
Start with one persona, master the system, then scale — do not skip steps or rush the process
